ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., clinical trial, observational study) */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of samples used in the experiment */,
  "study_design" TEXT /* Design of the study (e.g., randomized controlled trial, cohort study) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related experiment */,
  "time_point" REAL /* Time point of the measurement */,
  "v_value" REAL /* Value of cytokine V */,
  "h_value" REAL /* Value of cytokine H */,
  "p_value" REAL /* Value of cytokine P */,
  "ifne_value" REAL /* Value of IFNe */,
  "statp_value" REAL /* Value of STATP */,
  "irf7_value" REAL /* Value of IRF7 */,
  "irf7p_value" REAL /* Value of IRF7P */,
  "ifn_value" REAL /* Value of IFN */,
  "Units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for result values */,
  "assay_method" TEXT /* Method used for the assay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_points" (
  "time_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related experiment */,
  "time_value" REAL /* Time value */,
  "time_unit" TEXT /* Unit of time (e.g., hours, days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_points_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related experiment */,
  "protocol_description" TEXT /* Description of the protocol */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the protocol was created */,
  "protocol_version" TEXT /* Version number of the protocol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protocols_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result the metadata is associated with */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protocol used for the result */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes regarding the result */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_metadata_protocol_id FOREIGN KEY ("protocol_id") REFERENCES protocols ("protocol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_metadata_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related experiment */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "date_modified" TEXT /* Date when the version was modified */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "biological_markers" (
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biological marker */,
  "marker_name" TEXT /* Name of the biological marker */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the biological marker */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the biological marker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "result_marker_values" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result the marker value is associated with */,
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the biological marker */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the biological marker */,
  "value_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the marker value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id", "marker_id")
)
